filesCreated.purpose: Editor component - parent container with sortBlocks + Appender
Block metadata - main nav section with scroll/logo/sep/search/cta attributes
Editor component - nav bar with logo, utility row, inner blocks, mobile menu
Frontend template - mirrors TSX with scroll data attributes, ARIA, mobile menu
Frontend JS - scroll detection, menu toggle, focus trapping, submenu keyboard nav
Block metadata - nav item with link + submenuAlignment
Editor component - link/button with optional submenu dropdown
Frontend template - desktop button + mobile accordion, submenu dropdown
Editor component - submenu link with renameBlock
Frontend template - ThemeLink with hover styling

cssModifications.change: Added @custom-variant not-menu-open for collapsed mobile menu state

warnings: CSS optimization warnings for gap variables (pre-existing)
Asset size limit warnings for editor.js bundle (pre-existing)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP produce matching HTML structure for all block levels

variationsIncluded: Full Content (all fields, 6 nav items with submenus, SEP, search, mobile CTA)
Minimal Content (logo + 2 simple nav items only)
Hide on Scroll Down Desktop (tests scroll-down hiding)
Many Nav Items Overflow (8 nav items for wrap testing)
Long Submenu Items (tests auto-width dropdown with long text)

implementationNotes: SEP link renders as separate pill button above nav bar on mobile (md:hidden) and inline text link in utility row on desktop -- driven by single attribute, two render paths
Search link styled as decorative link (not form input), links to search page
Submenu alignment attribute (left/right) controls CSS positioning, with position-try-fallbacks CSS property for viewport overflow
Mobile menu expands within nav bar using max-height transition with menu-open/not-menu-open variants
Desktop submenus use absolute positioning with JavaScript toggle for open/close, keyboard nav (ArrowDown/Up/Escape/Tab)
Mobile submenus use independent accordion pattern with separate mobile button elements
Scroll behavior follows header.md block-type doc sections 3-4: data attributes, CSS variables, rAF throttling, passive scroll listeners
Focus trapping with Tab wrap and Escape close for mobile menu
Inert attribute on mobile menu items when closed
No hardcoded colors - uses bg-charcoal, text-white, text-neon-green, border-white tokens
